meaning: n.使寒冷之人或事物,冷却器
examples: If you plan properly, you'll know that you only need, say, 350g of beef and six rashers of bacon, not whatever weight is prepacked in the supermarket chiller.
But if not, consider investing in a little chiller bag.
Photo: Willis Carrier poses proudly in 1922 with the first chiller.
To get a hint of the computing power at Oakley, I was shown the chiller units.
An on-farm butchery room contained a walk-in chiller full of carcasses and prepared boxed meat, added the authority.
